overall.description: First-person exploration of a snowy coastal environment in a video game. The player walks along a waterfront path beside large geometric rock formations while heavy snow falls, then navigates through a narrow canyon between towering concrete or stone pillars. The atmosphere is cold and desolate with muted gray-brown tones and reduced visibility from the weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy coastal walkway with sea on right and cliffs on left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal path with heavy snow falling around

entered.detail: tall moss-covered rock wall running parallel to the path
dark choppy water with waves lapping against the concrete shore
large rectangular industrial building visible through the snow haze across the water
narrow wet concrete walkway with snow accumulating on the edges

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a snowy coastal path. To the left is a tall mossy cliff face, while dark choppy water stretches to the right. Through the falling snow, a large industrial building is visible in the distance across the water. The path is empty and the atmosphere is desolate and cold.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront transition area approaching rocky narrows

events.description: camera turns right to look out at the sea and the tall concrete wall across the water
approaching the entrance to a narrow passage between large geometric rock formations

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at the water and distant structures, then continuing toward a narrow gap in the rocks

entered.detail: massive vertical concrete barrier rising from the water across the bay
tall angular rock formations creating a narrow entrance ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to reveal a massive concrete sea wall across the water, then turns back to approach a narrow entrance between tall geometric rock pillars. The coastal cliff recedes to the left as the path leads toward the rocky narrows. Snow continues to fall heavily, reducing visibility of the distant structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage between towering geometric boulders

events.description: entering the narrow canyon passage with tall rock walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tight winding spaces between massive geometric rock pillars and walls

entered.detail: towering angular rock wall with mossy patches rising steeply overhead
matching geometric rock formation creating a narrow corridor
series of tall standing rock pillars blocking the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed canyon between massive geometric rock walls. The sea and distant views are now completely blocked by the towering rock formations. The path winds between tall angular boulders and pillars, creating a maze-like passage. Snow continues to fall but is partially blocked by the high walls, creating a sheltered yet claustrophobic atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, desolate coastline into the claustrophobic depths of a geometric stone canyon. It begins with a walk along a snowy path flanked by a mossy cliff and choppy dark water, with a distant industrial building barely visible through the heavy snowfall. As the camera turns to reveal a massive concrete sea wall across the water, the perspective shifts back toward a narrow entrance between towering rock pillars. The scene then transitions as the coastal cliff recedes and the camera enters the narrows, where the open sea and distant views are completely blocked by massive angular walls. Finally, the path winds through a maze of towering boulders and pillars, creating a sheltered yet oppressive atmosphere as the high walls shield the viewer from the falling snow.
